items.title: [Google Play 中评] ★3 [Correction]I got a bit upset with the G
items.summary: [Correction]I got a bit upset with the GUI and was very harsh with my first rating, so I rate it higher at a "3.5". My criticism remains. GUI and Game Design is terrible. You get bombarded with tons of badges and menus. It's very easy to get lost and it may affect your gaming experience. I would have loved to play it for longer but the GUI is a huge "no-no" for me. If you don't get bothered by those things, go ahead and play. Gameplay is very good.
items.author: Harald Nicko

items.summary: Ótimo jogo baixei pro acaso muito bom adurei os personagens todos cativantes a arte de jogar muito bonita eu adoro histórias sombrias e essa ta sendo a minha preferida
items.author: Azel Dragon Santos Costa
